dsl_rule.translation_notes: Multi-month low support approximated using s2 pivot support level. Entry requires: price below s2 (multi-month low proxy), price below 20MA (bearish confirmation), and price below pivot (failed monthly pivot crosses). Exit on reversal above s2. AUTHOR_SILENT exit conditions addressed with reasonable reversal stop. Stop-loss set to 3% to account for volatility in pharma sector context.

source_rule_text: If price breaks below the multi-month low support level, signal a SHORT trade expecting further weakness towards S2 and S3 support levels.
